briefdescription.para: The ScuTimer typically operates with a 32-bit counter, and this value represents the maximum possible count that can be stored in that counter.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance to be worked on
is the Scutimer Instance baseaddress to be worked on
is a pointer to the XScuTimer Instance

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful XST_FAILURE in case of failure
